_publications._publicationTitle: Integrating Functional Analysis in the Next-Generation Sequencing Diagnostic Pipeline of RASopathies.

_contextSnippet: Both RAF1:p.R391S and RIT1:p.D87H significantly increased pELK1 expression compared with the WT transcripts
details: Successfully demonstrated that RAF1:p.R391S and RIT1:p.D87H significantly increased pELK1 expression compared with WT transcripts
